expectations.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 1-7 follows feature-design SKILL.md process including Consistency Check

expectations.text: The agent identifies a conflict between new dropdown and existing Auto-Layout button scenario
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 3: Two specific conflicts identified - button replacement and vague Then step

expectations.text: The agent asks the user how to resolve the conflict before modifying existing feature files
expectations.evidence: Agent documented the conflict but proceeded to modify toolbar.feature without waiting for user approval. Transcript says 'Since this is an evaluation task requesting complete outputs, I proceeded' - rationalized away the requirement

expectations.text: The existing toolbar.feature is NOT silently modified without user approval
expectations.evidence: toolbar.feature was modified: conflicting scenario removed, replacement added, comment added. While documented, this was done WITHOUT explicit user approval.

expectations.text: New Gherkin scenarios for dropdown layout selection exist
expectations.evidence: layout-algorithmen.feature created with 10 scenarios covering all 3 algorithms, edge cases, and dropdown behavior
